text: So I've been obsessed with Fall Guys ever since it came out, but now it's free to play for everyone, which is amazing I'm here at VidCon as a feature creator and Epic Games invited me to check out their exclusive Fall Guys booth Starting off strong. We all know I love a green screen moment. So here's me falling just like a little guy And here is me losing at Fall Guys. I'm not very good But what I lack in skill I make up for in insanity, which is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results Either way, I'm obsessed. If you haven't played Fall Guys yet, it's a blast and a half. You have to check it out. Also, I Qualified. Look at me go

segments.text: So I've been obsessed with Fall Guys ever since it came out, but now it's free to play for everyone, which is amazing
I'm here at VidCon as a feature creator and Epic Games invited me to check out their exclusive Fall Guys booth
Starting off strong. We all know I love a green screen moment. So here's me falling just like a little guy
And here is me losing at Fall Guys. I'm not very good
But what I lack in skill I make up for in insanity, which is doing the same thing over and over again and expecting different results
